RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crsp_read_dbtablename.oracle
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch SecScope None implOracleSPReadTableRetSelectByPKeyNormal System implOracleSPReadTableRetSelectByPKeyNormal Cluster implOracleSPReadTableRetSelectByPKeyRestrictCluster Tenant implOracleSPReadTableRetSelectByPKeyRestrictTenant default error$

open retCursor for select $poptop Table implOracleSelectTableColumns$, $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$;

if( isSystemUser = 1 ) then open retCursor for select $implOracleSelectTableColumns$, $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$; else open retCursor for select $implOracleSelectTableColumns$, $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ and $lower reference ClusterIdColumn reference Table ClassCode$.$reference ClusterIdColumn DbColumnName$ = secClusterId; end if;

if( isSystemUser = 1 ) then open retCursor for select $implOracleSelectTableColumns$, $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$; else open retCursor for select $implOracleSelectTableColumns$, $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implOracleClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implOracleIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implOracleIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ and $lower reference TenantIdColumn reference Table ClassCode$.$reference TenantIdColumn DbColumnName$ = secTenantId; end if;
$switch SecScope None empty System empty Cluster implOracleSPReadTableCheckCluster Tenant implOracleSPReadTableCheckTenant default error$
and $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode = '$poptop Table ClassCode$'
